brief: A nursing training handoff with hip ORIF recovery, pain control, glucose checks, ambulation, wound and IV status, and follow-up needs for the next team.
license: Public YouTube origin; linked only, no mirrored media
sourceCopy: Bonfyre processed the public origin transiently, removed the downloaded media, and kept only derived artifacts.
whyItMatters: The same messy training audio becomes a clean transcript, a shift-ready brief, and a searchable handoff record with the original source still traceable.
